Skip to contents
metacheck 0.0.1.9002
  • Get Started
  • Example Report
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

RetractionWatch data

Source: R/retractionwatch.R
retractionwatch.Rd

DOIs and nature of statements from the RetractionWatch database. Use rw_date() to find the date it was downloaded, and rw_update() to update it.

Usage

retractionwatch()

rw()

Format

A data frame with 44784+ rows and 2 columns:

doi

Document ID

retractionwatch

Nature of note(s)

Source

https://api.labs.crossref.org/data/retractionwatch

Value

a data frame

Examples

retractionwatch()
#>                                   doi                  retractionwatch
#> 1                   10.1111/srt.13648                       Retraction
#> 2   10.1161/CIRCULATIONAHA.106.684795                       Retraction
#> 3          10.1016/j.jcpo.2025.100615                       Retraction
#> 4          10.3389/fendo.2025.1634580                       Retraction
#> 5          10.3389/fpubh.2023.1251701                       Retraction
#> 6           10.3389/fcell.2020.621509                       Retraction
#> 7          10.3389/fepid.2024.1492579                       Retraction
#> 8            10.3389/fncel.2017.00067                       Retraction
#> 9           10.3389/fphar.2021.628988                       Retraction
#> 10         10.3389/fpsyg.2025.1675490 Expression of concern;Retraction
#> 11         10.3389/fnins.2023.1168911                       Retraction
#> 12                 10.1002/ijgo.13064                       Retraction
#> 13        10.1016/j.jogoh.2018.10.023                       Retraction
#> 14        10.1016/j.jogoh.2019.08.002                       Retraction
#> 15        10.1016/j.jogoh.2019.101666                       Retraction
#> 16        10.1016/j.jogoh.2020.101728                       Retraction
#> 17        10.1016/j.jogoh.2020.101986                       Retraction
#> 18      10.1080/14767058.2017.1403580                       Retraction
#> 19                  10.1111/srt.13796                       Retraction

#> 21                  10.1111/srt.13912                       Retraction
